@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+import random
+from game_engine import Room, Prop
+
+# Prop definitions with their asset paths and themes
+PROP_LIBRARY = {
+    "tapestry_red_gold": {"asset": "assets/props/tapestry_red_gold.png", "themes": ["castle", "noble"]},
+    "shield_wall": {"asset": "assets/props/shield_wall.png", "themes": ["castle", "armory"]},
+    "candle_sconce": {"asset": "assets/props/candle_sconce.png", "themes": ["castle", "dungeon", "noble"]},
+    "bookshelf": {"asset": "assets/props/bookshelf.png", "themes": ["library", "noble"]},
+    "barrel": {"asset": "assets/props/barrel.png", "themes": ["dungeon", "storage"]},
+    "crate": {"asset": "assets/props/crate.png", "themes": ["dungeon", "storage"]},
+    "rug": {"asset": "assets/props/rug.png", "themes": ["noble", "library"]},
+    "potted_plant": {"asset": "assets/props/potted_plant.png", "themes": ["noble", "library"]},
+    "hanging_chain": {"asset": "assets/props/hanging_chain.png", "themes": ["dungeon"]},
+    "iron_chandelier": {"asset": "assets/props/iron_chandelier.png", "themes": ["castle", "dungeon"]},
+    "window_frame_moonlight": {"asset": "assets/props/window_frame_moonlight.png", "themes": ["noble", "library"]},
+}
+
+def decorate_room(room: Room):
+    """
+    Adds 4-8 decorative props to the room based on its theme.
+    """
+    theme = room.theme
+    # Filter props matching the room theme
+    matching_props = [name for name, info in PROP_LIBRARY.items() if theme in info["themes"]]
+    if not matching_props:
+        # fallback to all props if no theme match
+        matching_props = list(PROP_LIBRARY.keys())
+
+    num_props = random.randint(4, 8)
+    selected_props = random.sample(matching_props, min(num_props, len(matching_props)))
+
+    for prop_name in selected_props:
+        prop_info = PROP_LIBRARY[prop_name]
+        prop = Prop(asset_path=prop_info["asset"])
+        # Place prop contextually - simplistic random placement for demo
+        x = random.randint(1, room.width - 2)
+        y = random.randint(1, room.height - 2)
+        room.add_prop(prop, position=(x, y))
+        
+    return room
